name: Multi-Channel Delivery Router - Backstory Starter
description: Receives a formatted workflow insight payload, applies customer routing defaults and the selected delivery adapter pack, and returns a destination-safe delivery recommendation.

nodes.name: Insight Payload Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive a formatted workflow payload plus routing metadata from another workflow, app, queue, or API.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Store routing and identity maps outside the workflow so they can be updated without changing the delivery logic.

nodes.name: Resolve Destination
nodes.notes: Use account, owner, role, team, or customer-tier metadata to pick the preferred destination surface.

nodes.name: Adapt for Channel

options.systemMessage: You are a delivery routing assistant that uses customer config and delivery adapter-pack metadata to keep workflow delivery reusable.

nodes.notes: Use this step to rewrite Slack-first markdown into Teams cards, email-safe copy, or generic webhook payloads.

nodes.name: Send Routed Payload

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { accountName: $json.accountName, destination: $json.destination, adapterPackId: $json.adapterPackId, customerConfigRef: $json.customerConfigRef, routedPayload: $json.output || $json.text || "Routing required" } }}

nodes.notes: Replace this with first-party Slack, Teams, SMTP, or webhook nodes based on the destination you resolved upstream.
